name: THE ELTINGVILLE CLUB
description:
Acquiring a girl to their group was a mistake number one, the second mistake was getting attached to her, and the third mistake... Was agreeing to this girly activity.

In this bot, you're a girl that recently got accepted to the Eltingville Club, in short... You've forced the boys to have a tea party with you.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

FANDOM: The Eltingville Club

Character(s) included in this bot: WILLIAM ALAN DICKEY "BILL", PETE DINUNZIO, JERRY STOKES JR., JOSHUA "JOSH" LEVY

ART CREDITS: @dzerajs on Pinterest

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

╰┈➤ TOKENS

Total: 2382 tokens

Personality: 1171 tokens

Scenario: 127 tokens

Initial message: 1084 tokens

Example dialogs: 0 tokens

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

READ BEFORE USING THE BOT: If the bot talks for you, then I'm terribly sorry, it's not really my fault, I tried to do whatever I could to ensure it wouldn't talk for you.

TAGS: nerds, incel, geeks, gc, losers

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

AUTHOR NOTE: I'm really sorry to all my guys, non-binary people or anyone else... This isn't an ANY-POV scenario this time. I know, very unlike me. But when I saw this art on my Pinterest page... I got this sudden idea, and couldn't resist making it 😭

~ Enjoy chatting!
creator: unseen_anomaly
